languages.text: "Не хочу больше видеть это... существо. Сервиторизируй его и отправь куда-нибудь с глаз долой".
"I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."
languages.original_text: "Не хочу больше видеть это... существо. Сервиторизируй его и отправь куда-нибудь с глаз долой".

traits.locale_text: "I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."
"I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."
"You can serve wherever you wish, just as long as you stay out of my sight. Do something useful on the lower decks."
"I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."
"I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."

languages.text: 「どこでも働け。ただ、私の目に入らないようにだけ。下甲板で何か役に立つことをしろ」
languages.original_text: "You can serve wherever you wish, just as long as you stay out of my sight. Do something useful on the lower decks."

traits.locale_text: 「どこでも働け。ただ、私の目に入らないようにだけ。下甲板で何か役に立つことをしろ。」

languages.text: “我再也不想看到这……东西了。把他改造成机仆，送到我看不见的地方去。”
languages.original_text: "I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: “我再也不想看到这……东西了。把他改造成机仆，送到我看不见的地方去。”

languages.text: « Je ne veux plus jamais revoir ce... cette chose. Servitorisez-le et envoyez-le quelque part hors de ma vue. »
languages.original_text: "I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne veux plus jamais revoir ce... cette chose. Servitorisez-le et envoyez-le quelque part hors de ma vue. »

languages.text: «No quiero volver a ver esta... cosa. Servidorícenla y envíela lejos de mi vista».
languages.original_text: "I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: «No quiero volver a ver esta... cosa. Servidorícenla y envíela lejos de mi vista».

languages.text: "Bu... Şeyi bir daha görmek istemiyorum. Onu hizmetörleştirip gözümün görmeyeceği bir yere gönder."
languages.original_text: "I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: "Bu... Şeyi bir daha görmek istemiyorum. Onu hizmetörleştirip gözümün görmeyeceği bir yere gönder."

languages.text: "Ich will dieses ... Ding nie wieder sehen. Servitorisiert ihn und schafft ihn mir aus den Augen."
languages.original_text: "I do not want to see this... thing again. Servitorise him and send somewhere out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: "Ich will dieses ... Ding nie wieder sehen. Servitorisiert ihn und schafft ihn mir aus den Augen."
